---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement to the project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the capability you want.

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the smallest useful version of the idea.

## Scope Impact

Please note whether this affects:

- Runtime
- Web UI
- Tauri desktop shell
- Adapter behavior
- Documentation
- CLI commands

## Additional Context

Links, references, mockups, or examples.
